title: 讓步副詞子句 although / even though / even if

formulas.formula: Although/Even though + S + V, S + V.
Even if + S + V, S + V.

explanation: 此句型用於表達「雖然…但是…」的讓步關係。Although 和 even though 表示陳述已知事實，在句首或句中都可使用；even if 表示假設情景，不關心真偽。三者都不可與 but 同用在同一個句子裡，because but 與讓步意義重複。Though 較口語，可置於句尾表示「不過、然而」。此句型強調前半部事實不影響後半部結論的成立。

examples.eng: Although she is very busy, she still makes time for her family.
examples.chi: 雖然她非常忙碌，她仍然抽出時間陪伴家人。

examples.eng: Even though it was raining heavily, the outdoor concert went on as planned.
examples.chi: 儘管下著大雨，戶外音樂會仍按計畫進行。

examples.eng: Even if you study hard, success is not guaranteed in this competitive field.
examples.chi: 即使你努力學習，在這個競爭領域中也不能保證成功。

examples.eng: Though expensive, this medicine is effective in treating the disease.
examples.chi: 儘管昂貴，這種藥物在治療該疾病方面很有效。

extension.tip: 區分 even though 和 even if：even though 陳述真實情況（已發生或確定），even if 表示假設（不管是否真實）。注意不可在讓步子句後用 but，應改用逗號或用 still/yet/however 在主句。句型公式中的兩個 S + V 各為獨立句子，須有主詞和動詞。

examples.test: Even though he won the lottery, he is not happy.
examples.result: → 正確。陳述事實（已經贏得彩票），用 even though。

examples.test: Even if he won the lottery, he would not be happy.
examples.result: → 正確。表假設（假如贏得），用 even if 搭配虛擬語氣。

examples.test: Although she studied hard, but she failed the exam.
examples.result: → 錯誤。不可同時用 although 和 but，應刪除 but 或改為逗號。

extension.note: even though 看已經發生，even if 看假如發生；兩者都禁止配 but，要改用逗號或轉折詞。

parts: she was tired, she insisted on finishing the project that day.
exercises.sentence: Although she was tired, she insisted on finishing the project that day.
exercises.translation: 雖然她很疲倦，她仍堅持在當天完成這個專案。

parts: Even if you have the best equipment,
exercises.sentence: Even if you have the best equipment, you cannot succeed without practice.
exercises.translation: 即使你有最好的設備，沒有練習你也無法成功。

exercises.sentence: The team lost the match, though they played exceptionally well.
exercises.translation: 隊伍雖然輸掉比賽，但他們表現得格外出色。

parts: it rained all day, the children enjoyed playing in the garden.
exercises.sentence: Even though it rained all day, the children enjoyed playing in the garden.
exercises.translation: 儘管整天下雨，孩子們還是喜歡在花園裡玩耍。

vocab_table.zh: 雖然（表陳述事實的讓步）
即使、儘管（表陳述事實的讓步）
儘管（介系詞片語，後接名詞）
仍然（常與讓步句型搭配）
